% =====================================================================
% PRESET: Editorial / Magazine
% =====================================================================
% Disciplined magazine aesthetic — deep navy hero, cream backgrounds,
% one strong red accent, warm greyscale supporting palette.
% Inspired by long-form journalism layouts (New Yorker, Atlantic).
%
% Best for: review papers, position papers, comprehensive surveys —
% anything where the figure carries editorial weight and needs to feel
% authored rather than auto-generated.
%
% Design principle: ONE strong accent (deep red) used sparingly for the
% reader's attention anchor. Everything else lives in warm-grey/navy
% territory. Cream/ivory fills instead of pure white.
%
% Universal — same paste-ready block works across D/E/F/G.
%
% Paste-ready: copy the content below into a skeleton's
% "BEGIN PRESET DEFINITION ... END PRESET DEFINITION" block.
% =====================================================================

% ----- BEGIN PRESET DEFINITION -----
\definecolor{c_primary_line}{HTML}{2C2C2C}       \definecolor{c_primary_fill}{HTML}{FDFAF5}
\definecolor{c_hero_line}{HTML}{1A2A4A}          \definecolor{c_hero_fill}{HTML}{F5F0E5}
\definecolor{c_hero_deep}{HTML}{0A1A30}          \definecolor{c_hero_mid}{HTML}{2A3A5A}
\definecolor{c_hero_light}{HTML}{5A6A8A}         \definecolor{c_hero_pale}{HTML}{B5BFD0}
\definecolor{c_accent_line}{HTML}{B91C1C}        \definecolor{c_accent_fill}{HTML}{FEE2E2}
\definecolor{c_success_line}{HTML}{4A6B3A}       \definecolor{c_success_fill}{HTML}{E8EFE0}
\definecolor{c_data_curve_line}{HTML}{2C2C2C}    \definecolor{c_data_curve_fill}{HTML}{F0EBE0}
\definecolor{c_warning_line}{HTML}{B91C1C}       \definecolor{c_warning_fill}{HTML}{FEE2E2}
\definecolor{c_neutral_line}{HTML}{6B655C}       \definecolor{c_neutral_fill}{HTML}{F5F2EC}
\definecolor{c_bar_1}{HTML}{2C2C2C}              \definecolor{c_bar_2}{HTML}{8B7D6B}
\definecolor{c_bar_3}{HTML}{C5B697}              \definecolor{c_bar_4}{HTML}{B91C1C}
\definecolor{c_heat_5}{HTML}{1A2A4A}             \definecolor{c_heat_4}{HTML}{2A3A5A}
\definecolor{c_heat_3}{HTML}{5A6A8A}             \definecolor{c_heat_2}{HTML}{B5BFD0}
\definecolor{c_heat_bg}{HTML}{F5F0E5}
% ----- END PRESET DEFINITION -----
